summary: The diff implements a journey-key-based filtering approach for travelogue entries. A new journeyUtils.ts file introduces getJourneyKey() which creates a unique key per journey using city and createdAt timestamp. This key is then used throughout the frontend (AdminPanel, TraveloguePanel, DoodleItineraryDialogContent, RetroItineraryDialogContent, useQueries.ts) so that each journey's schedule items are stored and retrieved independently. This directly addresses REQ-1 by ensuring each journey displays only its own travelogue entries.
